page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmhfr6.20xlarge is a memory-optimized bare-metal style server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 80 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel Xeon 8269CY processors running at a clock speed of 3.1 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each of the 80 vCPUs maps directly to a physical core, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead.

The instance is equipped with 768.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 9.6 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, meaning storage must be provisioned externally. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers for distributed environments.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated physical core allocation and high memory density position this server as a premium resource for workloads requiring predictable CPU performance and large memory footprints. The lack of bundled local storage represents a tradeoff, requiring external block storage configuration, but allows users to scale storage independently of compute.

This hardware profile is suited for memory-intensive applications, large-scale databases, enterprise applications, and in-memory caching systems that require high memory capacity and dedicated, non-shared CPU execution.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized server with eighty dedicated physical cores and thirty-two gigabits per second baseline network bandwidth.

768.0 GB of system memory providing 9.6 GB per core

Suited for enterprise databases, in-memory caching, and memory-intensive workloads
